# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

# Chart.yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: webapp
description: A Helm chart for our web application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"

---
# values.yaml
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: webapp
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  tag: "1.0.0"

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 8080

resources:
  limits:
    cpu: 500m
    memory: 256Mi
  requests:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 128Mi

securityContext:
  runAsNonRoot: true
  runAsUser: 1000
  readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
  allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
  capabilities:
    drop:
      - ALL

podSecurityContext:
  fsGroup: 1000

# Database credentials MUST be provided via --set or external secret management.
# No default credentials are shipped with this chart.
# Example: helm install myapp ./webapp --set database.existingSecret=my-db-secret
database:
  host: "db-service"
  port: 5432
  name: "webapp"
  # Reference an existing Kubernetes Secret containing keys 'username' and 'password'
  existingSecret: ""
  # If existingSecret is not set, a Secret will be created from these values.
  # WARNING: You MUST override these at install time. The chart will fail if defaults are unchanged.
  username: ""
  password: ""

networkPolicy:
  enabled: true

---
# templates/_helpers.tpl
{{- define "webapp.fullname" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name .Chart.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "webapp.labels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "webapp.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "webapp.dbSecretName" -}}
{{- if .Values.database.existingSecret -}}
{{- .Values.database.existingSecret -}}
{{- else -}}
{{- include "webapp.fullname" . }}-db-credentials
{{- end -}}
{{- end -}}

---
# templates/secret.yaml
{{- if not .Values.database.existingSecret }}
{{- if or (eq .Values.database.username "") (eq .Values.database.password "") }}
{{- fail "\n\nFATAL: database.username and database.password must be explicitly set when database.existingSecret is not provided.\nUse: helm install myapp ./webapp --set database.username=<user> --set database.password=<pass>\nOr provide an existing secret: --set database.existingSecret=my-db-secret\nNever use default or empty credentials." }}
{{- end }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}-db-credentials
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    helm.sh/hook: pre-install,pre-upgrade
    helm.sh/resource-policy: keep
type: Opaque
data:
  username: {{ .Values.database.username | b64enc | quote }}
  password: {{ .Values.database.password | b64enc | quote }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "webapp.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "webapp.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      securityContext:
        {{- toYaml .Values.podSecurityContext | nindent 8 }}
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
          securityContext:
            {{- toYaml .Values.securityContext | nindent 12 }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: DB_HOST
              value: {{ .Values.database.host | quote }}
            - name: DB_PORT
              value: {{ .Values.database.port | quote }}
            - name: DB_NAME
              value: {{ .Values.database.name | quote }}
            - name: DB_USERNAME
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ include "webapp.dbSecretName" . }}
                  key: username
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ include "webapp.dbSecretName" . }}
                  key: password
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi

---
# templates/service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    {{- include "webapp.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }}

---
# templates/networkpolicy.yaml
{{- if .Values.networkPolicy.enabled }}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: {{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "webapp.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: {{ .Values.database.port }}
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
{{- end }}

---
# templates/tests/test-connection.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: "{{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}-test-connection"
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    "helm.sh/hook": test
spec:
  automountServiceAccountToken: false
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 1000
  containers:
    - name: wget
      image: busybox:1.36
      command: ['wget']
      args: ['--spider', '--timeout=5', '{{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}:{{ .Values.service.port }}/healthz']
      securityContext:
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        capabilities:
          drop:
            - ALL
  restartPolicy: Never
